items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding the audit trail showing 'AI agent' vs human actor. However, there is no direct evidence provided that confirms the expected outcome or the existence of the audit trail feature in the system. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not address this specific requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
